summary: Implementing dry_run: params.pop('dry_run'), when true use io.BytesIO() instead of opening real file, and skip fp.close()/file creation; guard checks with 'and not dry_run'. Will keep edits localized to the open_fp/created block so your backup logic before file-open should still slot in fine - let me know if you want a specific merge order.
